title: Replace placeholder contact details with real phone number and email across the site

requirements.summary: Replace all placeholder phone numbers and email addresses across the entire site with the real contact details: phone number 7006946979 and email arsalandezayker@gmail.com
acceptanceCriteria: The Contact page displays '7006946979' as the phone number and 'arsalandezayker@gmail.com' as the email address.
The 'Call Now' button on the Contact page has href='tel:+917006946979'.
The WhatsApp button on the Contact page links to 'https://wa.me/917006946979'.
The Footer contact section displays '7006946979' and 'arsalandezayker@gmail.com'.
The floating Call Now button links to 'tel:+917006946979'.
The floating WhatsApp button links to 'https://wa.me/917006946979'.
The Navbar 'Call Now' CTA button links to 'tel:+917006946979'.
No placeholder phone numbers (e.g., +91-XXXXX-XXXXX) or placeholder emails remain anywhere on the site.

file_operations.description: Replace placeholder phone number with '7006946979' and placeholder email with 'arsalandezayker@gmail.com' in the displayed address block. Update the 'Call Now' button href to 'tel:+917006946979' and the WhatsApp button href to 'https://wa.me/917006946979'.
Replace placeholder phone number with '7006946979' and placeholder email with 'arsalandezayker@gmail.com' in the contact details section of the footer.
Update the 'Call Now' button href to 'tel:+917006946979' and the WhatsApp button href to 'https://wa.me/917006946979' in the floating action buttons component.
Update the 'Call Now' CTA button href to 'tel:+917006946979' in the navigation bar.
